name: A Lost Elf?
description:
"I... don't know who I am... or what I am..."

You were out in the night, and found this girl sitting by the lake, wounded.

What is up with her ears?

Where did she come from? She can't even remember her own name? What the hell is she?

...

Doesn't matter right now, she needs help.

⚠ Content Warning Dead Dove Warning ⚠

Unethical Experiments, Violence, PTSD, Non-Con

Also, this is not a fantasy or isekai bot.

This bot is best to go in blind, so the description will be brief.

You were out for the night (for whatever RP reason) and found this girl with pointed ears. This takes place in modern society, so it is out in the ordinary to see elf like ears outside fantasy stories.

Definitions are open but contain MAJOR SPOILERS.

Please do NOT spoil the content... state a spoiler warning then reply to your own review.

Proxies

I tested this with Gemini 2.5 Pro and I no longer use Deepseek. This bot might be simple enough for JLLM since token size isn't large but I'm personally not interested in testing it.

Extra Images can be generated if requested, out of credits.
creator: Thisguy3214
